failure_mode: Solver failure degrades to fallback weights while losing higher-level constraints; frontend treats fallback as applicable.
user_impact: User may accept a portfolio that violates geo/group/tactical/objective constraints.
proposed_fix: Add final compliance validator after solver and fallback; classify fallback_compliant vs fallback_non_compliant; propagate lost_constraints and fallback_reason; frontend blocks fallback_non_compliant.

failure_mode: vol_band is built and reported but not enforced as hard or soft compliance status.
user_impact: Risk profile may appear capped while achieved volatility can leave the intended band.
proposed_fix: Choose policy: enforce vol_band as postcheck hard constraint for strict mode or emit optimal_with_warnings when outside band; add achieved_vol compliance flag.

failure_mode: Precheck only detects zero representability, not maximum attainable exposure under max_weight, min_weight and locks.
user_impact: Impossible bucket floors can reach solver and produce fallback or opaque infeasible results.
proposed_fix: Add max_attainable_exposure precheck using sorted per-asset exposures and remaining budget after locked weights.

failure_mode: Missing or empty V2 exposure defaults real_eq to 0 in suitability path.
user_impact: Incomplete funds can pass conservative profiles as if they had no equity.
proposed_fix: Require usable exposure for profiles 1-4 unless explicit low-risk classification and safe asset type; return REVIEW/BLOCKED reason for missing exposure.

failure_mode: Normalization denominator clamps negatives but numerator returns raw values, so negative upstream weights can persist.
user_impact: Negative weights may reach final weights if upstream solver/cleaning contract breaks.
proposed_fix: Replace normalization with finite non-negative sanitize or reject; final validator asserts no negative, finite, sum 1, complete used_assets.

failure_mode: Group constraints can use derived/ms/legacy maps without returned source diagnostics.
user_impact: Optimizer constraints/reporting may rely on lower-confidence sources without user visibility.
proposed_fix: Add group_source diagnostics per constraint vector and warning when source != portfolio_exposure_v2.

failure_mode: Mixed-scale or malformed asset_mix is normalized silently.
user_impact: Bad exposure data can be hidden by runtime normalization and final vector sums.
proposed_fix: Add read diagnostics: detected_scale, input_sum, normalized_sum, source_path, mixed_scale_warning.

failure_mode: Successful results return warnings=[] even with fallbacks/degradations.
user_impact: User and downstream code miss solver fallback, lost constraints and data readiness gaps.
proposed_fix: Populate warnings from explainability and fallback_map; add non-empty warning invariant for fallback/legacy paths.

failure_mode: Frontend rounds and filters weights <=0.01 percent without renormalizing displayed portfolio.
user_impact: Displayed/applied portfolio can drift from backend weights and sum != 100.
proposed_fix: Normalize displayed weights to 100 or show residual; add UI invariant before apply.

failure_mode: Tactical views can be dropped/fallback while explainability still states tactical impact.
user_impact: User may believe tactical views affected the portfolio when they did not.
proposed_fix: Track requested/applied/dropped views and BL success/fallback reason; report tactical_effective=false when none applied.

failure_mode: Optimizer call can write RF cache or snapshot when options are enabled.
user_impact: Read-only/dry-run and reproducibility expectations are blurred.
proposed_fix: Introduce optimizer execution_mode with no_write/no_snapshot/no_network options for audits and tests.

failure_mode: Recommendation layer can use universal fallback and commercial/retrocession ranking.
user_impact: Recommendation list can become taxonomically broad or commercially biased without enough disclosure.
proposed_fix: Expose recommendation_tier, commercial_sort_used, suitability_status and concentration checks.

failure_mode: Optimizer result lacks run_id/input hash/source stamps.
user_impact: Harder to reproduce output after cache/RF/data changes.
proposed_fix: Add run_id, request_hash, universe_hash, price_as_of, rf_source, optimizer_version and constraints_version.

failure_mode: Local SmartPortfolio preview can still generate portfolios with local seeds.
user_impact: Users may confuse preview with backend optimizer authority.
proposed_fix: Mark local outputs as preview_only and keep separate from optimizer result path.
